**Problem**: What's missing or painful?

**Solution**: How should Backend Brain handle this?

**Type**:
- [ ] New phase (which slot?)
- [ ] New script (what does it do?)
- [ ] New adapter (which AI tool?)
- [ ] Enhancement to existing
